examples: That is due to the matriarchy of its society.
In a matriarchy society people must have different conceptions of woman than in a patriarchy society.
The interpretation of matriarchy and patriarchy is pertinent to our interpretation of history and to the prospect of human future.
However, the problem turns out to be that matriarchy does not look at all like patriarchy at all.
Colombian society, one of old-fashioned machismo, may have to come to terms with an increasing trend toward matriarchy.
